title: 10 best herbal teas for overactive bladder
intro_desc: Herbal teas for overactive bladder are natural remedies that help alleviate symptoms of this condition by reducing muscle spasms and promoting bladder control. The best herbal teas for overactive bladder include Cassia auriculata, Crataegus monogyna, Vaccinium macrocarpon, Urtica dioica, Solanum dulcamara, Cynara scolymus, Lavandula angustifolia, Arctium lappa, Vaccinium myrtillus, and Valeriana officinalis. If left untreated, overactive bladder can lead to anxiety, social isolation, and disrupted sleep patterns, significantly impacting daily life and overall well-being.
